title: Frosty Ice Cream! Icy dessert
description: Who doesn’t love ICE CREAM? That cold… sugary taste on your tongue… Aren’t you the biggest fan of ice cream EVER?! Well, devoted ice cream fan, you can now become even more devoted with this new app! What do you get when you mix SUGAR + ICE + MILK ? ICE CREAM! I Scream, You Scream, We all Scream for ICE CREAM! Make your favorite flavored ice cream!
instructions: Features - Massive range of flavors to choose from - Design and create your own ice cream to make it gorgeous and extremely delectable - Tap to select your favorite flavours to decorate your yummy ice creams - Swipe to use the ice cream ma
